chooseHint: Choose a folder of Markdown files (e.g. your OneDrive NexusNotes folder). Novalis reads and writes plain <1>.md</1> files — nothing leaves your device.
cloudHint: This vault is in a {{provider}} folder. Notes kept online-only download on first open, which can cause a brief delay. For instant access, right-click the folder in Finder and choose “Always keep on this device.”

error.itemExistsTarget: "{{name}}" already exists in the target folder.
